article_title: Agent Harness：安全地使用你的数据——文件访问、审批与持久记忆
core_theme: 用 Microsoft Agent Framework 的 harness 给 AI Agent 加上文件访问、工具审批（手动/自动/自定义）和跨会话持久记忆（文件+Foundry）
reader_takeaway: 学会用 harness 的三项内置能力让 agent 安全读写用户数据、在高风险操作前暂停审批、跨会话记住事实
summary_angle: 从「agent 只能谈不能碰」到「文件读写 + 智能审批 + 双模记忆」的安全 Agent 升级路径

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「File Access」节：file_access_* 工具集读写 portfolio.csv
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧一个文件图标，agent 从中读取 CSV 数据并输出报告文件

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「Approvals」节：手动审批 + 自动审批规则 + 自定义小额交易规则
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央一个审批闸门，交易调用被拦截暂停，Approve/Deny/Auto-Approve 三层过滤

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「Durable Memory」节：文件记忆 + Foundry 事实记忆
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧两层记忆存储：底层粗粒度文件记忆，上层细粒度 Foundry 事实记忆

main_metaphor: 三层安全架构：底层是数据管道（文件访问），中间是审批守门人，顶层是持久记忆
primary_subject: 一个 Agent 在安全管道中工作：从左读取文件数据，中间通过审批闸门执行动作，右边写入记忆
subject_action: Agent 在文件读、交易审批和记忆存储之间安全流转
composition: 左到右三层管道：文件访问管道 → 审批闸门 → 记忆存储
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: cyberpunk comic mood, neon accents, rain-slick surfaces, dense urban tech atmosphere, controlled purple-blue usage
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从 40 项风格池随机选中（#12）；赛博朋克的城市安全/闸门/管道意象适合表达数据流经审批和记忆的多层安全架构
style_safety_note: 使用泛赛博朋克描述，限制紫蓝色使用（controlled usage），不引用具体作品或设计师
draft_goal: 验证文件访问→审批→记忆的三段管道结构
revision_targets: 赛博朋克安全主题的克制表达
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: Agent Harness — working with data safely through file access, approvals, and durable memory. Summary angle: From agent that only talks to agent that safely reads, gets approval before acting, and remembers across sessions. Narrative flow: 3-beat process. Information blocks: Step — file access on the left, agent reading CSV data and writing reports, 6 tools. Step — approval gateway in the center, trade calls intercepted with Approve/Deny/Auto-Approve filtering. Step — durable memory on the right, two layers: coarse file memory and fine Foundry fact memory. Main metaphor: A three-layer security pipeline — data pipe, approval gate, memory store. Subject: An agent working through a secure pipeline: reading files, passing approval gates, writing memories. Composition: Left-right pipeline: file access → approval gateway → memory storage. Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with cyberpunk comic mood, neon accents, controlled purple-blue usage. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist. Color palette: deep purple-blue, neon cyan, dark gray, warm amber. No poster title, no fake UI, no fake terminals.
